name: Stuffed Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (8 ounces) whole milk ricotta cheese
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
4 ounces Black Forest ham, cut into thin strips
4 artichokes cooked (in microwave oven), chokes removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a bowl, mix the ricotta, egg, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper until combined.
3. Add the diced ham to the mixture and stir well.
4. Stuff each artichoke with the ricotta mixture.
5. Place the stuffed artichokes in a baking pan.
6. Pour some water into the bottom of the pan.
7. Sprinkle breadcrumbs and melted butter over the top of the artichokes.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Yield: 4 servings
